name: Codebase Symbol Index
description: Builds and maintains a symbol-level index of the project codebase mapping class/method names to features. Enables fast symbol lookup without re-scanning all files.

Managers/CodebaseIndexManager.cs.content:
class CodebaseIndexManager
  BuildIndexAsync(string projectPath, List<FeatureEntry> features, CancellationToken ct) -> Task
  LoadIndexAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<CodebaseSymbolIndex?>
  SaveIndexAsync(string projectPath, CodebaseSymbolIndex index) -> Task
  LookupSymbol(CodebaseSymbolIndex index, string symbolName) -> List<SymbolSearchResult>
  UpdateSymbolsForFeature(string projectPath, string featureId, List<string> filePaths) -> Task
  GetSymbolsInFeature(CodebaseSymbolIndex index, string featureId) -> List<SymbolIndexEntry>
  Dispose() -> void

Models/SymbolEntry.cs.content:
class ExtractedSymbol
  Kind: SymbolKind
  Name: string
class TaskExecutionManager
  Signature: string
  FilePath: string
class CodebaseSymbolIndex
  Version: int
  Symbols: Dictionary<string, SymbolIndexEntry>
class SymbolIndexEntry
  FeatureId: string
  FilePath: string
  Kind: string
  ShortSignature: string
class SymbolSearchResult
  SymbolName: string
  FeatureId: string
  Confidence: double

patterns: Incremental index update per feature on task completion
dependencies: Uses SignatureExtractor to parse source files
